allow: Bash(printf 'package com.enterprise.knowledge.interface.rest;\\n\\nimport com.enterprise.knowledge.application.service.DualEngineCoordinator;\\nimport com.enterprise.knowledge.application.service.RagService;\\nimport com.enterprise.knowledge.domain.ChatResponse;\\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\\nimport org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;\\n\\nimport java.io.IOException;\\nimport java.util.HashMap;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping\("/api/v1"\)\\npublic class KnowledgeController {\\n    private final DualEngineCoordinator coordinator;\\n    private final RagService ragService;\\n\\n    public KnowledgeController\(DualEngineCoordinator coordinator, RagService ragService\) {\\n        this.coordinator = coordinator;\\n        this.ragService = ragService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @PostMapping\("/chat"\)\\n    public ResponseEntity<ChatResponse> chat\(@RequestBody ChatRequest request\) {\\n        return ResponseEntity.ok\(coordinator.answer\(request.getQuery\(\)\)\);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping\("/health"\)\\n    public ResponseEntity<Map<String, Object>> healthCheck\(\) {\\n        Map<String, Object> status = new HashMap<>\(\);\\n        status.put\("status", "UP"\);\\n        return ResponseEntity.ok\(status\);\\n    }\\n\\n    public static class ChatRequest {\\n        private String query;\\n        public String getQuery\(\) { return query; }\\n        public void setQuery\(String query\) { this.query = query; }\\n    }\\n}\\n' > /Users/chenxi/Desktop/JAVA/backend/src/main/java/com/enterprise/knowledge/interface/rest/KnowledgeController.java)
